identity.mission: Create a clinical, trustworthy, and high-efficiency interface for hospital transport management. Reject generic SaaS templates; embrace functional precision.
identity.emotional_tone: Clinical Precision. Trustworthy. Urgent but Calm. Professional.
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Primary (Hygiene/Clarity). Optional Dark Mode for Night Shift Drivers.

rules: Headings must use 'Manrope'. NO Inter for Headings.
Use relaxed leading for body text to improve readability in high-stress environments.
Driver App: Minimum text size is 16px (text-base) to ensure legibility on mobile while driving/parked.

usage_rules: NO GRADIENTS for text or primary buttons. Keep it solid and high-contrast.
Use 'Red' ONLY for critical errors or 'Stop' actions.
Use 'Yellow' for maintenance alerts or delays.
Use 'Teal' (Primary) for all primary actions and brand presence.
Driver App: Use high-contrast backgrounds (White vs Slate-900) for outdoor visibility.

bento_grid_rules: Admin/Manager Dashboard must use a Bento Grid.
Key Metrics (Active Trips, Available Drivers): col-span-2 or col-span-4.
Lists (Recent Requests): col-span-4 row-span-2 vertical list.
Never leave empty white space in the dashboard; fill with 'Quick Actions' or 'Status Summaries'.

shadcn_customization.inputs: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:border-teal-500 h-10 md:h-12
shadcn_customization.buttons: font-medium h-10 md:h-12 px-6 rounded-md tracking-wide

DriverCard.description: Large card for mobile drivers. Big buttons, clear status labels.
DriverCard.styles: bg-white p-6 rounded-lg shadow-md border border-slate-100 touch-manipulation

StatusBadge.styles: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wide

DispatchMap.styles: w-full h-[500px] rounded-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden relative

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all interactive elements on mobile (Driver App).
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (teal-500) for keyboard navigation.

anti_slop_rules: NO generic 'Welcome to...' hero sections. Start with Data/Action.
NO transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or modals.
universal_guidelines.component_reuse: Check /components/ui before building new ones. Customize Shadcn.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Driver View as a Mobile-First PWA experience.
Use the provided image URLs for avatars and map placeholders.
Prioritize the 'Clinical Precision' aesthetic: Clean, White/Teal, Structured.
Ensure the Dispatch Console uses the full width of the screen (High Density).
For the 'Odometer OCR' feature, simulate the UI with a camera button and manual input fallback.
